columns.name: SPRHOLD_SEQUENCE_NO
columns.description: SEQUENCE NUMBER: Unique Sequence number for each Hold record.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_PIDM
columns.description: Internal identification number of the person.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_HLDD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the type of hold on person record.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_USER
columns.description: This field identifies the system user signon id initiating hold.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_FROM_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the effective begin date of hold.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_TO_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the end date hold expires.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_RELEASE_IND
columns.description: This field indicates that only the system user who entered the hold may release the hold. Valid value is: Y - allow only system user to release hold.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_REASON
columns.description: Free format field which identifies the reason hold was placed.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_AMOUNT_OWED
columns.description: This field identifies a dollar amount associated with hold.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_ORIG_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies person/office who authorized hold status.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field defines most current date record is created or changed.

columns.name: SPRHOLD_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SPRHOLD_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.
